servinfo.title: Gear Shift and Select Shaft Assembly Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Gear Shift and Select Shaft Assembly Components

s1.ptxt: Remove battery and battery tray with ECM.
Disconnect gear shift and gear select control cables from transaxle.
Remove gear shift interlock bolt (1) and 5th to reverse interlock guide bolt (2) (if equipped) from transaxle case.
Remove gear shift guide case bolts (4) and gear shift & select shaft assembly (3).

attention2.ptxt: Be sure to use new bolt with pre-coated adhesive. Otherwise, bolt may loosen.

s1.ptxt: Install gear shift & select shaft assembly in the following procedure.

s2.ptxt: Install new gasket and gear shift & select shaft assembly (1).
Tighten gear shift guide case No.1, No.2 and No.3 bolts by hand.

attention2.ptxt: Be sure to use new gear shift guide case No.2 and No.3 bolts with pre-coated adhesive. Otherwise, bolt may loosen.

s2.ptxt: Tighten gear shift guide case No.1 bolt to specified torque.

torqueitem.t-part: Gear shift guide case No.1 bolt*

s2.ptxt: Tighten gear shift guide case No.2 and No.3 bolts to specified torque.

torqueitem.t-part: Gear shift guide case No.2 bolt*
Gear shift guide case No.3 bolt*

s1.ptxt: Install new washer and gear shift interlock bolt, and then tighten it to specified torque.

attention2.ptxt: Be sure to use new gear shift interlock bolt with pre-coated adhesive. Otherwise, bolt may loosen.

s1.ptxt: Install new washer (if equipped) and 5th to reverse interlock guide bolt (if equipped) and then tighten it to specified torque.

attention2.ptxt: Be sure to use new 5th to reverse interlock guide bolt with pre-coated adhesive. Otherwise, bolt may loosen.

s1.ptxt: Connect gear shift and gear select control cables to transaxle.
